product_name: Galilean Boat with Jesus & Apostles Playset

bullets: Interactive Play Set: This 15-piece play set allows children to recreate the biblical story of Jesus and his disciples on the Sea of Galilee, bringing the "Tale of Glory" to life.

Comprehensive Figures: The set includes 14 figures, featuring Jesus, Simon Peter, Andrew, John, James (the greater), Phillip, Bartholomew, Thomas, Matthew, James (the lessor), Thaddeus, Simon the Zealot, Judas Iscariot, and Matthias.
Galilean Boat: A large Galilean Fishing Boat is included, serving as a central component for imaginative play and storytelling based on the biblical narrative.
Age Appropriateness: This interactive play set is suitable for children aged 3 years and older, providing an engaging way to learn about biblical events.
Age Appropriateness: This interactive play set is suitable for children aged 3 years and older, providing an engaging way to learn about biblical events.
content.keywords: christian, bible, religious, toy, historical, figurines
content.description: Children bring the story of Jesus and the Apostles to life with this charming play set. The complete collection features a mini storybook describing the story of Jesus with his Apostles on the Sea of Galilee and 15 toy pieces ideal for little hands to play and learn. Note: 12 figurines are shown in the photo. However, the set comes with 14 figures. A figurine of Jesus is also included as is one for Matthias who is the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot as described in the book of Acts.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
